name: Torq Private Channel Sync
description: This PlugIn forwards private channel events (messages, membership changes) to Torq via HTTP webhook trigger.

settings_schema.header: Configure where private channel events are sent for Torq ingestion.

settings.help_text: The Torq webhook trigger to which URL events will be POSTed. This is required.
Shared secret Key (Auth header). Configure the matching key as a condition in your Torq webhook trigger. This is optional, but recommended.
Shared secret sent with the defined auth header. Configure the matching value as a condition in your Torq webhook trigger. This is required only if you're defining an Auth header.
If enabled, events from every private channel are forwarded. If disabled, only channels listed below are forwarded.
Only used when 'Sync all private channels' is disabled. Comma-separated list of channel IDs to forward events for.
If disabled, only metadata (channel, user, post ID, timestamp) is sent — not the message text. Recommended off unless your Torq use case requires content inspection.
